g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the input image look like entering SwinUNet?')
sendPrompt('What does Swin Stage 1 produce and how does W-MSA work at this resolution?')
sendPrompt('What does Swin Stage 2 detect at 64x64 after patch merging?')
sendPrompt('What does Swin Stage 3 detect at 32x32?')
sendPrompt('What does Swin Stage 4 produce at the deepest level and why is the bottleneck below it?')
sendPrompt('What does the bottleneck do and why is it placed between encoder and decoder?')
sendPrompt('How does dec3 upsample and concatenate with the f3 skip connection?')
sendPrompt('How does dec2 upsample and concatenate with the f2 skip connection?')
sendPrompt('How does dec1 upsample and concatenate with the f1 skip connection?')
